myDashboard.title: My Dashboard
myDashboard.description: Your enrolled courses and learning progress.

storefront.title: Your learning starts here
storefront.description: Pick your first course and start building real clinical skills.

orders.title: Orders & Billing
orders.description: Your past orders, receipts, and payment status.
orders.emptyDescription: Courses you purchase or enroll in will show up here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage how you appear across Bosla.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description: Manage your account preferences and security.

Dashboard.comingSoonMessage: We're still working on this part of Bosla — check back soon.

loading.label: Loading your dashboard…
loading.errorDescription: We couldn't load this page. Please try again.

content.videoPlaceholderDescription: Video playback isn't available yet — check back soon.
content.quizPlaceholderDescription: This lesson's quiz isn't available yet — check back soon.
content.noBodyDescription: This lesson doesn't have any content yet.

quiz.instructions: Answer every question, then submit to see your score.
quiz.validationError: Please answer every question before submitting.

toasts.failed: Quiz submitted — you didn't pass this time.

resume.emptyTitle: This course has no lessons yet
resume.emptyDescription: Check back soon — content for this course is still being prepared.

error.title: Couldn't load this lesson
error.description: We couldn't load this page. Please try again.

toasts.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Checkout.title: Checkout
Checkout.stepLabel: One step away from starting this course.
Checkout.lessonCount: {count, plural, =0 {No lessons} one {# lesson} other {# lessons}}

summary.title: Order summary
summary.couponHint: Have a discount code? It's applied when you continue.
summary.secureNote: You'll complete your payment on our payment partner's secure page.

result.verifyingDescription: We're confirming your payment with the provider. This usually takes a few seconds.
result.newTabHint: We opened the secure payment page in a new tab. This page will update automatically once you're done — or cancel below to come back now.
result.paidDescription: Your enrollment is active. Taking you to your course…
result.failedDescription: You weren't charged for this attempt. You can try again any time.
result.timeoutDescription: This is taking longer than usual. If you completed the payment, your access will unlock automatically — you can also check again now.

dashboardPrompt.title: Become an Instructor
dashboardPrompt.description: Apply to author and sell your own courses on Bosla.
dashboardPrompt.pendingDescription: Your Instructor application is under review.

apply.title: Apply to become an Instructor
apply.description: Tell us about your background — an Admin will review your application.

form.credentialsHint: e.g. DPT, RD — shown alongside your name once approved.

toasts.submitted: Application submitted — we'll review it shortly.

status.pendingDescription: Your Instructor application is being reviewed. We'll let you know once a decision is made.
status.rejectedDescription: Your Instructor application wasn't approved this time.
status.noApplicationDescription: Complete an Instructor application to get access to the Instructor Panel.

students.title: Students
students.emptyDescription: Once someone enrolls in this course, they'll show up here.

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.emptyDescription: Create a discount code to help promote this course.

panel.title: Instructor Panel
panel.description: Manage your courses, students, and earnings.
panel.myCoursesDescription: Create, edit, and submit your courses for review.
panel.studentsDescription: See who's enrolled in your courses and their progress.
panel.couponsDescription: Create and manage discount codes for your own courses.
panel.earningsDescription: See revenue collected for your courses so far.
panel.profileDescription: Edit your public bio, credentials, and avatar.

myCourses.title: My Courses
myCourses.description: Your own courses — create, edit, and submit them for review.
myCourses.emptyDescription: You haven't created any courses yet. Create your first one to get started.

courseEditor.createDescription: Add a new course to your catalog. It starts as a draft only you can see.
courseEditor.notEditableTitle: This course can't be edited right now

notEditableDescription.in_review: This course is submitted and awaiting review — you can't edit it until an Admin makes a decision.
notEditableDescription.published: This course is published. Contact an Admin if it needs changes.
notEditableDescription.archived: This course is archived. Contact an Admin if it needs changes.

createdNextSteps.title: Course created — here's what's next
createdNextSteps.description: Your course is saved as a draft. A few recommended next steps:
createdNextSteps.uploadMediaHint: Scroll down to the Media section.
createdNextSteps.submitHint: Submit it for review once you're ready to publish.

curriculum.title: Curriculum
curriculum.description: Build your course's modules and lessons — drag to reorder.
curriculum.readOnlyNotice: This course is no longer a draft, so its curriculum is read-only. Contact an Admin if it needs changes.
curriculum.emptyDescription: Add your first module to start building this course's curriculum.
curriculum.noLessonsDescription: Add a lesson to this module to get started.
curriculum.confirmDeleteModule: Delete the module "{title}"? This also deletes all of its lessons. This cannot be undone.
curriculum.confirmDeleteLesson: Delete the lesson "{title}"? This cannot be undone.

lessonForm.videoAssetIdHint: Choose an existing video, or upload a new one, from the Media Library.
lessonForm.quizHint: This lesson's quiz is created automatically. Use the "Manage quiz" button in the curriculum to add and edit questions.
lessonForm.durationHint: Leave blank if not yet known.
lessonForm.isPreviewHint: Lets a visitor watch this lesson before enrolling.

attachments.label: Attachments
attachments.hint: Downloadable files for this lesson — students see them in the player's Resources tab.
attachments.add: Add a file from the library

lessonForm.saveVideoFirst: Save the lesson first — the video upload area appears when you edit it.

videoUpload.dropTitle: Drag & drop videos here, or click to browse
videoUpload.dropHint: MP4, MOV, WebM, MKV, or AVI — up to 8 GB. Uploads go directly to secure storage and can be paused and resumed.
videoUpload.notConfiguredDescription: Direct video uploads are disabled on this deployment. An administrator needs to add the VIDEO_STORAGE_* environment variables (see docs/video-system.md).

states.processing: Processing video — generating qualities and thumbnails…

curriculum.unsavedOrder: You changed the order — save it to apply.

quiz.title: Quiz
quiz.description: Author this quiz's questions and answers.
quiz.readOnlyNotice: This course is no longer a draft, so this quiz is read-only. Contact an Admin if it needs changes.
quiz.noQuestionsDescription: Add your first question to start building this quiz.
quiz.confirmDeleteQuestion: Delete the question "{prompt}"? This cannot be undone.

settingsForm.heading: Quiz settings
settingsForm.passThresholdHint: The minimum score a student needs to pass this quiz.

questionForm.choicesHint: Select the correct answer, and use the arrows to reorder choices.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your public bio, credentials, and avatar — shown alongside your courses.
profile.avatarImageIdHint: Choose an existing image, or upload a new one, from the Media Library.

students.title: Students
students.description: Everyone enrolled in your own courses, and how far along they are.
students.emptyDescription: Once someone enrolls in one of your courses, they'll show up here.

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.description: Discount codes scoped to your own courses.
coupons.createDescription: Set up a new discount code for one of your courses.
coupons.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters, or create a new coupon.

fields.codeHint: Letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only — always stored uppercase.

toasts.conflict: This coupon was changed by someone else. The list has been refreshed.

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.description: Your revenue, balances, payouts, and sales history.
earnings.notLinkedDescription: Your account isn't linked to an instructor profile yet — contact the Bosla team.
earnings.emptyDescription: Once a student purchases one of your courses, your share appears here.
earnings.payoutsEmpty: No payouts yet — your available balance is swept into the next payout run.

payoutAccounts.title: Payout account
payoutAccounts.empty: Declare where you'd like to be paid — payouts need a destination.
payoutAccounts.detailsHint: Visible to Bosla admins only, used when executing your payout.
